Intraday post (10/Nov)

Updated window of risk:

Window of Risk Pt. 2 - Flows update

Weekly post:

Geo and policy uncertainity is here - Weekly post (10-14/Nov)

There has been the clock shift in US as well, don’t forget. CPI on Thursday,PPI on Friday;theoretically…

INTRADAY POSTCoding today’s positioning:

The speed profile is net positive, very steeply, and net gamma is net positive too. The pattern is like a short ratio spread, heavily selling upside volatility and betting on time, expecting a slow but stable grind up. But the strategy doesn’t look like hedging downside, so, it is very vulnerable, generating a very fat left-tail.Market is betting on an upside gamma magnet towards 6850, once the centroid is broken at 6841.85However the magnetic force starts to kick in at 6835.91, and due to this heavy realized vol selling, it rather looks like a rejection at the centroid.

Downside pivot is at 6784.85,and downside target is 6719.96, with a small potential reversion towards 6758Volatility should calm down here. If it doesn’t, 6680 and even 6600 is on the table, see script inputs.

Customers want to see a slow grind up,But if 6757 holds into the PM (around 2PM), 6780 can pin locally. They win if vol is crushed and time is passing anyway. But again: the positioning is vulnerable to downside and any vol up move.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
